option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
*.iml .gradle /local.properties /.idea/caches /.idea/libraries /.idea/modules.xml /.idea/workspace.xml /.idea/navEditor.xml /.idea/assetWizardSettings.xml .DS_Store /build /captures .externalNativeBuild .cxx local.properties app/google-services.json
# Configuración Firebase Web (contiene API keys - NO subir al repo) **/firebase-config.js # El archivo de ejemplo SÍ se versiona: !**/firebase-config.js.example
# Build folders de todos los módulos **/build/ **/.transforms/ # Firebase Functions functions/node_modules/ functions/lib/ functions/.env

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
*.iml .gradle /local.properties /.idea/caches /.idea/libraries /.idea/modules.xml /.idea/workspace.xml /.idea/navEditor.xml /.idea/assetWizardSettings.xml .DS_Store /build /captures .externalNativeBuild .cxx local.properties app/google-services.json app/google-services-base64.txt
# Configuración Firebase Web (contiene API keys - NO subir al repo) **/firebase-config.js # El archivo de ejemplo SÍ se versiona: !**/firebase-config.js.example
# Build folders de todos los módulos **/build/ **/.transforms/ # Firebase Functions functions/node_modules/ functions/lib/ functions/.env
